title: The Election Laws (Extension to Sikkim) Act, 1976
full_text: The Election Laws (Extension to Sikkim) Act, 1976 निर्वाचन विधि (सिक्‍किम पर विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम,1976 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197610 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 1976-01-25 Act Year: 1976 Short Title: The Election Laws (Extension to Sikkim) Act, 1976 Hindi Title: निर्वाचन विधि (सिक्‍किम पर विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम,1976 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of the Representation of the People Act, 1950 and the Representation of the People Act, 1951, to the State of Sikkim.
